content.en:
this day.

The White River Realm God of the Realm Court and many other Realm Gods came to the vicinity of the Terran Holy Country, standing in the designated position, and assisting Ye Tian to relocate the ten eternal realms of the Terran Race to the location of the Realm God Realm.

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, let's start!"

The White River Realm God said.

......

This side of the Terran Endless Kingdom Alliance.

The ten eternal kingdoms that have been selected for a long time are now beginning to move.

This time, many half-step Eternal Realm God Realms would enter the Realm God Realm with these ten Eternal Realms.

Rumble!!!!

With the help of the Eternal Decree, the Eternal Realms were shielded by the Light Shield, broke away from the Endless Realm Alliance, and entered the realm of the Realm God along the rift.

Soon.

Bang!!!

One after another, eternal kingdoms descended on the vicinity of the Terran Holy Kingdom, covering the ruins.

Gradually, the eleven Terran Eternal Realms occupied this area and became a huge territory of the Terran Race in the realm of the Realm God Kingdom.

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, let's count the situation!"

Shirakawa realm Shinto.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

Soon after, after the White River Realm Gods and their statistics were completed, they returned to the Realm Court Headquarters.

And in the next 717 days, these half-step Eternal Realm God Realms who came from the Eternal Realm Realm joined the Terran Saint Kingdom Chamber of Commerce one after another, so that they had a better chance to obtain more resources.

Moreover, the Terran Saint Kingdom Chamber of Commerce is still acquiring the Xuan Devouring Demon Crystal material, even if the effect is not very good, how much can be collected.

......

After the Terrans became a medium power, they had the advantage of being able to do business outside the realm of Eastern Wu.

In the past, if it was not a medium force, no matter how powerful the Terrans were, they were not allowed to go to other realms to do business, and could only go to other realms to trade in an individual way.

Of course.

The medium forces don't dare to trade in other realms, after all, the medium forces are too weak, where do the forces dare to cover the two realms!

Unless it is a medium power that happens to be at the junction of the two realms, it will do business in the two realms.

After becoming a medium power, there is also the benefit that you can go to the Eternal Frontier without applying.

Each middle force has a few places, as long as they do not exceed these places, they can allow the Realm God to travel freely between the Eternal Realm and the Realm God Realm, but they need to enter the Eternal Realm through a specific passage.

Because of this, the realm gods of medium forces, powerful forces, and top forces almost do not need to apply.

Otherwise, if you have to apply, the staff of the Boundary Court will be too busy!

However, Ye Tian still wanted to develop the human race into a powerful force as soon as possible, because only by becoming a powerful force could he enjoy many privileges.

For example, the construction of a trading area, similar to Momen's Moyun Valley.

Of course, after becoming a powerful force, the biggest advantage is that he has entered the high-level circle of the Eastern Ukraine Realm, and his ability to obtain opportunities and intelligence is not comparable to that of a medium force.

For example, the Terrans are only a medium force now, and a lot of information cannot be understood in time.

Moreover, powerful forces can also recommend the gods of the realm to serve in the headquarters of the realm court, all the gods in the realm court are from powerful forces, top forces, and the realm gods of medium power are not qualified to serve in the realm headquarters, even the most rubbish position, it is not something that the mid-force realm gods can hold.

Because of this, Ye Tiancai wanted to become a powerful force and let another Realm God enter the Realm Court Headquarters to take up a certain position, so that he could also obtain some important information as soon as possible.

"At present, the human race only lacks some Eternal Realm God Realm junior powerhouses, and it can be ranked among the powerful forces!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

He is going to take out some more resources to cultivate the Terran Realm Gods, and there are several Realm Gods whose Eternal Dao Species have also improved a lot, and they are not very far from the current limit, so they can completely cultivate them, so that they can raise the Eternal Dao Species to the current limit as soon as possible.

He still has one more thing to do.

"AFDJ Mountain, it's time to wipe out this force!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Mt. Tianhedao. []

Now that this place has recovered a little, the palaces are standing here again, and the injuries of the gods of the Heavenly Providence Realm and the God of the Vessel Armor Realm have also recovered.

However, the strength of Tianhe Dao Mountain is a little weaker than before.

Because, some of the realm gods and the Eternal Supreme Dao Realm have left the Tianhe Dao Mountain and joined other forces.

They thought that Tianhe Dao Mountain had provoked an unknown enemy, so they naturally did not dare to stay in Tianhe Dao Mountain any longer, and if they were attacked again in the future, they would not be so lucky to survive.

For this situation, the Heavenly Providence Realm God could not stop it.

After all, those realm gods have joined other forces and have backers, and he can't retaliate.

But most of the realm gods still haven't left, mainly because they are bound by oaths and can't leave easily.

this day.

The gods of the Heavenly Providence Realm felt palpitations all over their bodies, and it seemed that a lot of things had happened.

He immediately deduced it, only to feel an endless rush of despair.

"Not good!"

He immediately realized that something was wrong and wanted to escape from Tianhe Mountain.

But suddenly.

A terrifying attack struck.

Rumble!!!!!!

This area of Tianhe Dao Mountain was directly shattered by the attack, and a large number of Realm Gods, Half-Step Eternal Realm God Realm, and Eternal Dao Realm turned into ashes in an instant.

And the gods of the Vessel Armor Realm were also severely injured and dying, and so were the gods of the Heavenly Providence Realm.

"Ice Sideburns Realm God!"

The Heavenly Providence Realm God recognized the attacker, and it was a Realm God who had condensed five Eternal Realm God Realms, but wasn't this guy dead? Why did he still condense six Eternal Realm Spirits and break through to the mid-level peak realm of the Eternal Realm God Realm.

In fact, this was also a copy of Ye Tian's body, and he happened to have seen the Ice Sideburns Realm God, and the other party was also close to the mid-level peak of the Eternal Realm God Realm.

So, after copying the body of the Ice Sideburns Realm God, he tried to impact and condense the sixth Eternal Realm Spirit, and tried many times, but luckily succeeded in this one.

Then, he used the body of the Ice Sideburns Realm God to attack Tianhe Dao Mountain, which should be able to easily erase Tianhe Dao Mountain.

Of course.

The Heavenly Providence Realm God also thought that this was not the real Ice Sideburns Realm God, "You are not the Ice Sideburns Realm God, you and the Realm God who attacked us last time should be the same force, who are you, why are you attacking us again and again Tianhe Dao Mountain?"

However, no one answered him.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian shot again, directly killing the Heavenly Providence Realm God and the Vessel Armor Realm God.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian erased everything here, leaving no trace, and then dispersed the replica body and turned into nothingness.

By the time the Realm Court sent the Realm God to investigate, nothing could be found.
